falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme market pressure, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal or breakout rather than a continuation of the bottom_2024_aug pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in pattern similarity implies the current market dynamics no longer align with the historical bottom_2024_aug scenario, invalidating the basis for the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Central bank intervention (e.g., emergency rate cut or QE announcement) occurs within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an event would introduce exogenous shock(s) altering market behavior, directly contradicting the HOLD signal and rendering the current verdict obsolete.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
